data.content: Implementation complete. Branch: worktree-foolery-9bc7 (commit 571403ed) pushed to origin. Fixed overview column header so the title badge, Hide button, and count badge wrap vertically at narrow column widths. Changes: moved overflow-hidden from the column section onto the body div, replaced justify-between with ml-auto, removed shrink-0 from the count cluster, dropped basis-14 on the title region. Added className regression test src/components/__tests__/beat-state-overview-matrix-header.test.ts (4 tests). Quality gates clean: lint, tsc --noEmit, bun run test (2754 passed), bun run build. Browser verification with Playwright was skipped because no chromium binary is installed in this environment; verified the rendered className tree via the new regression test which renders the matrix with --overview-column-width=40px.
